sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114686" key="xrhsth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114686.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χρήστης</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:262H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.262H.</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
